name: dashboard-status-api
description: Create GET /api/dashboard/status endpoint returning aggregated country status: last purchase date, purchase status, is_active flag, file sync status (mock for now).
instruction:
1. Create backend/app/modules/dashboard/__init__.py and router.py
2. GET /api/dashboard/status returns for each country:
   - country_code, country_name
   - is_active: from opco_schedules auto_buy_enabled
   - next_purchase: calculated from schedule weekdays
   - last_purchase_date: latest purchased_at from purchase_records per country (Firestore query)
   - purchase_status: derived from last_purchase_date (e.g., 'Last purchased X days ago' or 'Never purchased')
   - file_last_loaded: mock for now (today - 1 day, status='loaded')
   - file_status: 'loaded' (mock)
3. Register in main.py
4. Permission: require_permission('purchase', 'read')
5. Filter by allowed_countries for scoped users
6. Add unit test in tests/unit/test_dashboard.py
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/dashboard/status returns status for all countries
Response filtered by allowed_countries for scoped users

name: dashboard-country-toggle-api
description: Create PUT /api/dashboard/toggle endpoint to enable/disable country auto-buy. Updates opco_schedules auto_buy_enabled. Logs to audit trail.
instruction:
In backend/app/modules/dashboard/router.py:
1. PUT /api/dashboard/toggle body: {country_code: str, is_active: bool}
2. Update opco_schedules doc for country_code: set auto_buy_enabled = is_active
3. Log to audit trail with action='OPCO_TOGGLE'
4. Permission: require_permission('maintenance', 'write')
5. check_country_access
6. Return updated status
7. Add unit test
acceptance_criteria: Audit trail entry created with action OPCO_TOGGLE

name: dashboard-frontend-rebuild
description: Rebuild Dashboard page to use /api/dashboard/status endpoint. Add ON/OFF toggle column, refresh button, country click navigation, RBAC country filtering.
instruction:
Rewrite frontend/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx:
1. Replace mock data with useQuery to GET /api/dashboard/status
2. Add Switch component (Ant Design) in last column for ON/OFF toggle
   - Blue (#2175D9) when ON, gray (#B3B3B3) when OFF
   - onClick: PUT /api/dashboard/toggle with useMutation
   - Show only if user has maintenance:write permission (use PermissionGate or canToggle flag)
3. Add Refresh button (ReloadOutlined, blue primary) above table
   - onClick: invalidateQueries(['dashboard-status'])
4. Country code click: router.push('/itrp?country={code}')
5. Filter countries by allowedCountries() for OpCo users
6. Keep existing: flags, color coding, sorting, legend
acceptance_criteria: ON/OFF toggle switch in last column
OpCo user sees only their country

name: verify-o005
description: Deep-verify O-005: dashboard matches spec, toggle works, refresh works, RBAC works. Run tests, docker build, lint.
instruction:
1. ruff check backend + frontend lint
2. python -m pytest tests/unit/ — all pass
3. docker compose up --build — containers start
4. Login as admin — see all 11 countries with toggle
5. Login as opco.pl — see only PL
6. Toggle OFF for a country — verify audit trail entry
7. Click refresh — data reloads
8. Update O-005 KR progress
